message:
fix: strengthen test assertions and remove unused imports

- Remove unused imports (validateOneOf, validatePositiveInt) from undo.ts
- Strengthen classifyOutcome test assertions to verify evidence exists
  before checking outcome values (prevents silent test pass if evidence is empty)
- Increases expect() calls from 56 to 62 in validate-command.test.ts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
